ItacPersonItem.Notes: In 1630 he delivered to the Umoristi Academy the presentation `Che la corte e` vera scuola non solamente della prudenza, ma delle virtu` morali`, subsequently published in Prose vulgari (1646). His portrait is in Prose (1653), and was signed by a member of the Piccini family.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
